DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. THE 1/14/00 ORDER SETTING ASIDE THE PAYMENT TERMS IS VACATED AND THE 9/16/99 ORDER SETTING FORTH THE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $810.36 FILED BY WYLER, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDER, RAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WYLER, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLDER, RAUL $746.29 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $794.29, $810.36 LESS 20% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE NET $746.29 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE WILL BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM PER COMM. KAPLAN.
